_doc: August pipeline event ledger. Visits, qualified inbound, replies, calls, and paid trials are counted from events here. Cleared cash is counted only from state/aug1/revenue-received.json. Do not store personal contact data, private customer data, secrets, or raw emails in this file.

event_types.visit: A real public proof-page or inbound-surface visit.
event_types.qualified_inbound: A buyer message that meets the qualification gate.
event_types.reply: A real human reply sent or received.
event_types.call: A qualified buyer call scheduled or completed.
event_types.paid_trial: A paid pilot, trial feed, audit, or scoped setup.
